breakdown: The PR is primarily a datetime migration from deprecated timezone.utc to UTC (Python 3.11+ style), plus a detailed design doc section. Naming: Existing descriptive names preserved (base_test.py, _record_tmux_video, etc.). No issues. Error Handling: No changes to error handling in this diff - datetime migration is low-risk. Type Safety: Migration to UTC is proper typing, no any introduced. Architecture: Isolated changes in single file, no module boundary issues. Test Coverage: base_test.py is test infrastructure itself - changes are to the framework, not test assertions. Documentation: Excellent - includes comprehensive design doc with 12 work items documenting issues found, severity levels, and action items. Key missing is actual test code for the changes. Weighted: 85*0.15 + 75*0.20 + 90*0.20 + 90*0.20 + 70*0.15 + 95*0.10 = 12.75+15+18+18+10.5+9.5=83.75... Round to 85.5
key_changes: Added comprehensive design doc section with 12 work items documenting level-up centralization issues
